arts.ttl: Aberdeen vs Celtic gets Sky Sports VIP status as red carpet rolled out for top of the table Pittodrie showdown
arts.sum: The league's top two teams go head to head at Pittodrie on Wednesday night - with Sky Sports giving the game top billing for viewers

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson suggests Brendan Rodgers should now start 'quality' Celtic player v Aberdeen
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson says Luke McCowan is ‘putting a case’ forward to start for Celtic at Aberdeen Celtic outclassed Ross County on Saturday and the so-called bench players proved their worth by putting in numerous high-quality displays.

arts.ttl: Aberdeen vs Celtic: Live stream, TV channel and team news for Pittodrie meeting
arts.sum: Football Scotland takes a look at kick-off times, TV listings and team news ahead of the seismic showdown. Otherwise, you will be able to watch the highlights, which will be posted on YouTube via club accounts and Sky Sports Football after the game.

arts.ttl: 7 Celtic presser headlines as Brendan Rodgers talks injuries, Luke McCowan Scotland chances and Invincibles comparisons
arts.sum: He has a winning mentality, he has great technical quality, tactically he's learning all the time and you see now the clarity in his work and how good he was. "If you look at the likes of Luke McCowan who's only just come in, he's adapted his style in order to play for us.

arts.ttl: 'That doesn't happen at Celtic or against Brendan Rodgers...' Gordon Dalziel slams Rangers media's actions
arts.sum: Dalziel shared that the Rangers media team have been ‘putting out stats’ like that one in recent weeks and he told Open Goal that it shows a lack of leadership from the manager because he simply shouldn’t allow it to happen. He shared that Celtic wouldn’t do that against Rodgers and the champions wouldn’t do such a thing if they were in that embarrassing situation.

arts.ttl: 6 Rangers presser headlines as Philippe Clement uses Nicolas Kuhn logic to ease fan worries over goalscoring woes
arts.sum: But with questions still looming over their season so far having been sat 11 points behind Celtic in the title race heading into the midweek fixtures, plenty of talk about Rangers ' lack of prolific manner in front of goal was on the agenda - with Kuhn used as an example to issue a sense of patience behind the Light Blues' squad. I don't want to make comparisons too much with other teams, but the better player in the offensive part on the other side of the town was six months ago, or last season, he was not starting there [Nicholas Kuhn].

arts.ttl: James Forrest shares how Celtic contract renewal came to fruition amid Brendan Rodgers influence
arts.sum: Recently, James Forrest signed a one-year contract extension at Celtic to continue his long association with the club into a 15th successive year, cementing himself as a legend at Parkhead . James Forrest on Brendan Rodgers and his Celtic contract renewal

arts.ttl: Luis Palma told 'writing is on the wall' at Celtic as Alexandro Bernabei latest emerges – Hoops transfer bulletin
arts.sum: Wide man Palma has struggled for game time this season and former Hoops striker John Hartson believes the Honduras star's race is run in Glasgow

arts.ttl: John Hartson urges Celtic double transfer action in emotional move for former star as 'writing on wall' quip made
arts.sum: John Hartson has told Brendan Rodgers how to approach the January transfer window, as Celtic look to further grip their hands on the Scottish Premiership title and dream of Champions League success - by telling the club to sign Kieran Tierney and sell Luis Palma That would only be expedited with signings in January, and with Celtic likely to qualify for the play-off round of the Champions League proper, Hartson has urged an emotional return for homegrown star Tierney - whilst also stating that the club should accept a move for out-of-sorts star Palma if a bid arrives.

arts.ttl: 'Big surprise'... What shocked Pat Bonner about Celtic's hammering of Ross County
arts.sum: What amazed Pat Bonner about Celtic’s win over Ross County There can’t be too many positives for Don Cowie to take back up to Dingwall from the Celtic Park mauling but Bonner reckons that what Ross County did in the second half will please The Staggies manager.
